_meta.description: Schema type × page type validation matrix for Roden Law
_meta.audit_source: PHP source review — inc/schema-helpers.php + inc/firm-data.php (v1.3.0 reflects post-fix schema pushes through 2026-03-20)

status_legend.present: Schema block confirmed present and valid (by PHP source)
status_legend.present_warn: Schema block present but has issues
status_legend.absent_ok: Schema block absent — expected/correct for this page type
status_legend.absent_gap: Schema block absent — MISSING, should be present

homepage._notes: Organization now correctly typed as ['Organization','LawFirm']. LocalBusiness @type now includes LawFirm. reviewCount sourced from firm_data. Single-item BreadcrumbList emitted.

pillar._notes: LegalService now uses page-specific @id ('{page_url}#legalservice') with isPartOf back to firm entity. roden_schema_pa_attorney() outputs Person for E-E-A-T.

intersection._notes: ERR-006 resolved: roden_get_canonical_url() now builds correct /[parent-slug]/[child-slug]/ paths without /practice-areas/ prefix. LocalBusiness now output via roden_schema_local_business_single(). Person via roden_schema_pa_attorney(). LegalService areaServed narrowed to office city.

subtype._notes: ERR-006 resolved: canonical URL mismatch fixed. Person schema output via roden_schema_pa_attorney(). Article schema from roden_schema_article_subtype() with About link to parent pillar. WARN-005 (wordCount) remains a content-level concern.

location._notes: Speakable now added (was absent_gap in v1.2.0). LegalService emitted via LocalBusiness @type ['LocalBusiness','LegalService','LawFirm']. FAQPage populated from _roden_faqs meta. BreadcrumbList includes State intermediate crumb.

neighborhood_location._notes: NEW page type added in recent schema push. roden_schema_neighborhood_legal_service() outputs rich LegalService with areaServed (neighborhood + parsed service area communities), makesOffer (6 top PAs), geo (neighborhood-specific if lat/lng set), openingHours, and directions URL. roden_schema_local_business_neighborhood() outputs parent office LocalBusiness with neighborhood in areaServed. BreadcrumbList navigates: Locations > State > City > Neighborhood.

attorney._notes: ERR-001 resolved: Person @id now always uses rodenlaw.com canonical domain. Eric Roden now shows SC bar admission (ERR-004 resolved). worksFor @type correctly set to 'Organization' matching /#organization @id.

case_result._notes: BreadcrumbList code confirmed: is_singular('case_result') falls through to generic is_singular() branch. No rich schema type needed for case results.

resource._notes: HowTo built from ordered list items (Strategy 1) or H2/H3 headings (Strategy 2). Fallback if no steps found is silent skip. BreadcrumbList: Locations > Resources > [Title].

blog_post._notes: WARN-002 resolved: image dimensions now use wp_get_attachment_image_src() so width/height match the 'large' size URL. Author linked to attorney Person entity when _roden_author_attorney meta is set. WARN-004 (ToC text in description) remains an editorial concern.

sc_ppc_landing._notes: ERR-007 RESOLVED: roden_schema_sc_statewide() now outputs LegalService (SC-wide areaServed, serviceLocation = 3 SC offices), FAQPage (6 SC-specific Q&As with S.C. Code § citations), and LocalBusiness for all 3 SC offices. BreadcrumbList intentionally excluded — template is in $is_landing list.

archive._notes: Attorneys archive outputs ItemList wrapping Person entities. OPEN: worksFor @type:'LegalService' still references /#organization @id — type mismatch. See ERR-003 (partial fix). BreadcrumbList via is_post_type_archive() branch.

errors.issue: PARTIAL FIX: In roden_schema_attorneys_list() (schema-helpers.php line 1626-1629), worksFor has @type:'LegalService' but @id:'https://rodenlaw.com/#organization'. The attorney page (roden_schema_person) and PA attribution (roden_schema_pa_attorney) now correctly use @type:'Organization', but the archive page attorney list still has the mismatch.
errors.impact: Medium: JSON-LD consumers dereferencing the @id on the attorneys archive page find an Organization entity, not a LegalService. Entity resolution ambiguity for AI citation indexing.
errors.expected_fix: In roden_schema_attorneys_list(), change worksFor @type from 'LegalService' to 'Organization' to match the /#organization @id.

errors.issue: BlogPosting description field includes auto-generated Table of Contents text from the excerpt when no manual excerpt is set, producing messy, SEO-unfriendly descriptions.
errors.expected_fix: Require manual excerpt on all blog posts. Add wp_admin notice or meta box guidance to prompt editors.

errors.issue: Sub-type pages with low wordCount (e.g., under 800 words) may not qualify for Article rich results. Google prefers substantial article content.
errors.expected_fix: Expand sub-type page content to minimum 1000 words. Editorial/content task, not a schema code issue.

resolved_errors.resolution: roden_schema_person() now uses $firm['url'] . '/attorneys/' . $atty_slug . '/#person' for canonical @id, not get_permalink().
firm-data.php eric-roden bar_admissions now includes 'South Carolina'. Schema code supplements from firm data to build hasCredential, so SC bar now appears.
roden_schema_legal_service() now generates page-specific @id ('{page_url}#legalservice') for non-homepage pages, with isPartOf pointing to /#legalservice.

roden_get_canonical_url() helper introduced. For child practice_area posts, builds URL as home_url('/parent-slug/child-slug/') without /practice-areas/ prefix. All schema functions use this for URL and @id fields.
roden_schema_sc_statewide() function added. Dispatcher triggers it via is_page_template('templates/template-landing-sc-statewide.php'). Outputs LegalService + FAQPage + LocalBusiness (3 SC offices).
reviewCount now sourced from $firm['trust_stats']['review_count'] (firm-data.php line 223) with fallback to 500.
roden_schema_article() now uses wp_get_attachment_image_src($img_id, 'large') to get URL + dimensions for the same image size.

validation_runs.pages_audited: PHP source review only — inc/schema-helpers.php (1779 lines) + inc/firm-data.php + inc/rewrite-rules.php. All dispatcher logic, schema builder functions, and office data cross-referenced.
validation_runs.method: Static PHP source analysis. No live site fetch (per CLAUDE.md rules). Diff from v1.2.0 based on code-confirmed fixes.
validation_runs.summary: 6 critical/high errors resolved, 3 warnings resolved. 1 error remains (ERR-003 partial). 2 content-level warnings remain (WARN-004, WARN-005). 1 new page type documented (neighborhood_location). 9/10 prior schema coverage gaps closed.

validation_runs.method: WebFetch HTML inspection of production site (rodenlaw.com)
